name: Black Hole (Pirate Foil)
effect_text: [Main] If your Leader has the "Blackbeard Pirates" type, negate the effect of up to 1 of your opponent's Characters during this turn. Then, if that Character has a cost of 4 or less, K.O. it.[Trigger] Negate the effect of up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards during this turn.
